system.description:
When you send a steading's people into danger or rally them against an attack, roll +Defenses: on a 10+, it goes as well as can be expected; on a 7-9, it works but someone chooses 1 from the list below. If the steading is acting from a position of strength, you choose. Otherwise, the GM chooses.

  • It's less effective than you expected
  • Injuries abound; the steading marks diminished (disadvantage to Deploy, Muster, Pull Together)
  • The GM picks a named NPC involved in the action; they die

success.value: It goes as well as can be expected.

partial.value: It works but someone chooses 1 from the list (you choose if acting from strength, GM chooses otherwise).

failure.value: It fails badly. (Up to GM interpretation)
